hero.description: Complete construction and renovation services for apartments, houses, offices and commercial properties.

services.title: Complete Range of Services
services.description: We perform every stage of construction and renovation on a turnkey basis.
services.apartmentDesc: Complete apartment renovation from rough construction to premium finishing.
services.houseDesc: Turnkey construction, reconstruction and renovation of private houses.
services.commercialDesc: Renovation of offices, shops, restaurants and commercial buildings.
services.demolitionDesc: Fast and safe demolition services with professional debris removal.
services.roughDesc: All rough construction work completed according to modern building standards.
services.electricalDesc: Installation, replacement and modernization of electrical systems.
services.plumbingDesc: Professional installation of plumbing, water supply and sewage systems.
services.finishingDesc: High-quality interior finishing using modern materials and technologies.

portfolio.title: Our Projects
portfolio.subtitle: A selection of our completed construction and renovation projects.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the questions our clients ask most often.
faq.answer1: Yes. We provide an official warranty for all completed work, which is specified in the contract.
faq.question2: Do you work with commercial properties?
faq.answer2: Yes. We renovate offices, shops, restaurants, warehouses and other commercial buildings.
faq.answer3: Yes. We carry out both complete renovation projects and separate demolition works.
faq.answer4: After approving the estimate and signing the contract, we can begin work as soon as possible.
